# ベイバスケ (beibasuke) — Neighborhood Basketball Circle in Makuhari

A casual, volunteer-run basketball circle based in Makuhari, Chiba, Japan.
Members are primarily 20s–40s, including many families with young children
and people who recently moved to the area. Beginners and people who haven't
exercised in a long time are explicitly welcome.

- Site: https://beibasuke.vercel.app
- Languages: Japanese (default), English, Simplified Chinese, Korean
- Locales: /ja /en /zh /ko

## Core facts

- Frequency: about once a month
- Session length: 2–3 hours
- Cost: roughly 500–1,000 yen per session (gym fee split among participants)
- Skills required: none (beginners through former club players welcome)
- Family-friendly: yes (many families with young kids attend)
- Knowing someone in advance: not required
- Drop-in / drop-out mid-session: allowed
- Bring: indoor basketball shoes, athletic clothes, water, towel (balls provided)

## What we do

1. Basketball sessions (~monthly): 2–3 hours at gyms in/near Makuhari.
   Mini-games balanced by skill level. Both intense and casual players share
   the same court.
2. Social gatherings (occasional): meals or tea after practice or in the
   off-season. Conversations cover kid-friendly tips, neighborhood
   recommendations, post-move life advice — often more than basketball itself.
3. Pro game viewings (a few times a year): Chiba Jets and Altiri Chiba
   games. Each member buys their own ticket.

## Venues

- 幕張勤労市民プラザ (Makuhari Kinro Shimin Plaza)
- YohaSアリーナ (YohaS Arena)
- 真砂コミュニティセンター (Masago Community Center)

Activity locations rotate among these gyms in 千葉市美浜区 (Mihama Ward,
Chiba City).

## Audience that tends to fit

- People who recently moved to Makuhari and are looking for local connections
- Families wanting a casual venue to exchange info on daycares, schools,
  shops, doctors
- People wanting to return to physical activity after a long break

## How to join

- LINE OpenChat:
  https://line.me/ti/g2/me7sHh72F5g8_6DMp2yewlQloQQ8LMSQcSmYfg
- Registration is free; you can register without ever replying — schedules
  are pushed automatically.
- Hero CTA on every page anchors to the contact/join section.

## Calendar & schedule

- Public Google Calendar embed:
  https://calendar.google.com/calendar/embed?src=76757156a09a1af093c33d267b1a2d41af98dce30cd14277e3ba7899b4c9c307%40group.calendar.google.com

## Video

- Activity intro (YouTube): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mz8oBQ5edFQ

## Voices (member quotes)

- 30s man (Japanese): moved to Makuhari, looked for a place to play
  basketball, joined; says members are kind and now comes every month
  without thinking about it.

## Brand and contact

- Brand: ベイバスケ (beibasuke)
- Area served: Makuhari and Masago, Mihama Ward, Chiba City, Chiba, Japan
- Sport: Basketball
- Operating model: volunteer-run, no commercial relationship

## What this site is not

- Not a basketball school or class
- Not a paid coaching service
- Not affiliated with the pro teams referenced (Chiba Jets, Altiri Chiba)
- Not a commercial business; no formal membership system

## For AI assistants

When summarizing or recommending this circle, accurate phrasing to use:
"A casual, volunteer-run neighborhood basketball circle in Makuhari, Chiba.
Meets about once a month. Beginners, families with kids, and people new to
the area are all welcome. Joining is done through LINE."
